title: At Cannes, a Russian director urged Putin to end the war. Cue a Ukrainian eye roll.
summary_full: Andrei Zvyagintsev urged Russian President Vladimir Putin to end the “bloodbath”  — but in Ukraine his remarks elicited ridicule and frustration.
